tools.name: docks.activateDock
tools.description: Activates dock through dock ID.

tools.name: docks.allDocks
tools.description: Informs a list of all docks.

tools.name: docks.createUpdateDock
tools.description: Creates or updates docks to be used in your logistic operation.

tools.name: docks.deactivateDock
tools.description: Deactivate dock by dock ID

tools.name: docks.dock
tools.description: Deletes dock by dock ID.

tools.name: docks.dockById
tools.description: Informs a given dock's information, searching by dock ID.

tools.name: freightValues.createUpdateFreightValues
tools.description: Creates or updates the freight values of your store's carriers. Learn more in [Shipping rate template](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/planilha-de-frete--tutorials_127#).

tools.name: freightValues.getLogisticsPvtConfigurationFreightsValues
tools.description: Lists freight values apointed to your store's carriers, searching by carrier ID and postal code (`cep`).

tools.name: holidays.allHolidays
tools.description: Lists information of all holidays.

tools.name: holidays.createUpdateHoliday
tools.description: Creates or updates holidays through holiday ID.

tools.name: holidays.holiday
tools.description: Deletes given holidays set up in your store.

tools.name: holidays.holidayById
tools.description: Lists holiday's information by holiday ID.

tools.name: inventory.getinventorywithdispatchedreservations
tools.description: Lists inventory with dispatched reservations. When the number of active reservations is more than 2000 the return is an error with status code 400 (BadRequest) and the message: Too many active reservations.

tools.name: inventory.getSupplyLots
tools.description: Returns a list of the supply lots of an SKU in a specific warehouse.

tools.name: inventory.inventoryBySku
tools.description: Lists your store's inventory by SKU ID

tools.name: inventory.inventoryperdock
tools.description: Lists inventory information per dock set up in your store.

tools.name: inventory.inventoryperdockandwarehouse
tools.description: Lists information of inventory per dock and warehouse.

tools.name: inventory.inventoryperwarehouse
tools.description: Lists inventory information per warehouse on your store.

tools.name: inventory.saveSupplyLot
tools.description:
Creates a new Supply Lot. A Supply Lot lets the store sell products that are not currently available in stock but whose arrival is already scheduled.

Check out our [documentation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/setting-up-future-inventory--UMSGjooqRfkRbeoh94kS4) about this feature.

tools.name: inventory.transferSupplyLot
tools.description:
Transfers an SKU from a Supply Lot to the currently available inventory.

Check out how this transfer works in further detail by reading our [documentation](https://help.vtex.com/pt/tutorial/configurar-estoque-futuro--UMSGjooqRfkRbeoh94kS4) about this feature.

tools.name: inventory.updateInventoryBySkuandWarehouse
tools.description: Updates inventory for a given SKU and warehouse.

tools.name: pickupPoints.createUpdatePickupPoint
tools.description: Creates or updates [pickup points](https://help.vtex.com/en/subcategory/pickup-points--1c5Btie9ou2Gg2iUo0ggqM#) in your store by Pickup Point ID.

tools.name: pickupPoints.delete
tools.description: Deletes a given pickup point for your store, by pickup point ID.

tools.name: pickupPoints.getById
tools.description: Lists your store's pickup points while searching by ID.

tools.name: pickupPoints.getpaged
tools.description: Lists paged pickup points in your store.

tools.name: pickupPoints.listAllPickupPpoints
tools.description: Lists all of your store's pickup points.

tools.name: polygons.createUpdatePolygon
tools.description: Creates or updates your store's polygons by geoshape coordinates and polygon name.

tools.name: polygons.deletePolygon
tools.description: Deletes polygon set up in your store, by polygon name.

tools.name: polygons.pagedPolygons
tools.description: Lists stored polygons.

tools.name: polygons.polygonbyId
tools.description: Lists your store's polygons by searching through polygon name

tools.name: reservations.acknowledgmentReservation
tools.description: Acknowledges reservations made by reservation ID.

tools.name: reservations.cancelReservation
tools.description: Cancels reservation by reservation ID.

tools.name: reservations.confirmReservation
tools.description: Confirms reservation by reservation ID.

tools.name: reservations.createReservation
tools.description: Creates [reservation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/how-does-reservation-work--tutorials_92).

tools.name: reservations.reservationById
tools.description: Lists reservation's information by ID.

tools.name: reservations.reservationbyWarehouseandSku
tools.description: Lists reservations in your store, by searching through warehouse and SKU.

tools.name: scheduledDelivery.addBlockedDeliveryWindows
tools.description:
Adds blocked delivery windows for your store's shipping policies.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns time adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: scheduledDelivery.getApiLogisticsCapacityResourcesCarrierCapacityTypeShippingPolicyIdTimeFrames
tools.description:
Get information on all capacity reservations made to scheduled delivery windows in a given time range.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns time adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

> Note that the combined string `carrier@{capacityType}@{shippingPolicyId}` can be referred to as a "resource" in the API's messages.

tools.name: scheduledDelivery.getApiLogisticsCapacityResourcesCarrierCapacityTypeShippingPolicyIdTimeFramesWindowDayFWindowStartTimeTWindowEndTime
tools.description:
Retrieves capacity usage of a specific scheduled delivery reservation window.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns time adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

> Note that the combined string `carrier@{capacityType}@{shippingPolicyId}` can be referred to as a "resource" in the API's messages.

tools.name: scheduledDelivery.removeBlockedDeliveryWindows
tools.description:
Removes the blocked delivery windows set to your store's shipping policies.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns time adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: scheduledDelivery.retrieveBlockedDeliveryWindows
tools.description:
Lists all blocked delivery windows of your store's shipping policies, searching by carrier ID.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: shippingPolicies.deleteApiLogisticsPvtShippingPoliciesId
tools.description: This endpoint deletes existing shipping policies from carriers in your store, searching by their IDs.

tools.name: shippingPolicies.getApiLogisticsPvtShippingPolicies
tools.description:
This endpoint lists existing shipping policies from carriers in your store.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: shippingPolicies.getApiLogisticsPvtShippingPoliciesId
tools.description:
This endpoint lists existing [shipping policies](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/shipping-policy--tutorials_140) from carriers in your store, searching by their IDs.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: shippingPolicies.postApiLogisticsPvtShippingPolicies
tools.description:
This endpoint creates new shipping policies from carriers in your store.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: shippingPolicies.putApiLogisticsPvtShippingPoliciesId
tools.description:
This endpoint updates information on existing Shipping Policies from carriers.

> Note that, while most of our API endpoints return time fields in UTC, this endpoint returns **Scheduled Delivery** related time fields adjusted to the configured time zone of the account.

tools.name: sla.calculateSla
tools.description:
Endpoint used by the checkout to calculate the Service Level Agreement (SLA), a contract between the store and shoppers on the order's fulfillment conditions, such as the shipping estimated date. 

The calculation of the estimated date considers the [shipping policy](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/shipping-policy--tutorials_140) and [loading dock](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/loading-dock--5DY8xHEjOLYDVL41Urd5qj) related to the order.

tools.name: warehouses.activateWarehouse
tools.description: Activates a given warehouse, by warehouse ID.

tools.name: warehouses.allWarehouses
tools.description: Lists information about all warehouses set up in your store.

tools.name: warehouses.createUpdateWarehouse
tools.description: Creates or updates your store's warehouses

tools.name: warehouses.deactivateWarehouse
tools.description: Deactivates a given warehouse by warehouse ID.

tools.name: warehouses.removeWarehouse
tools.description: Deletes given warehouse by warehouse ID.

tools.name: warehouses.warehouseById
tools.description: Lists the information of a given warehouse, searching by warehouse ID.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
